codeReview.summary: The feature implementation satisfies the requested orchestration: detectDocument loads/validates via loader, extracts page text with disableNormalization=true, filters TextItems, runs indexing + pattern detection + context scoring + mode-default decisions through detectPipeline, merges entities, and returns both entities and IndexedPage results. Integration tests cover multi-page behavior, progress callbacks, confidence/decision behavior, 80-char context scoring, merging, and empty-page handling.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The engine-worker skill does not explicitly call out cross-line regex false positives/single-line filtering as a common detection-pipeline concern, even though this feature needed that mitigation.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Feature handoff skillFeedback.suggestedChanges requests adding this guidance, and implementation added explicit newline-span filtering in src/core/pipeline/detect-document.ts:263-269.

summary: Reviewed detection-pipeline (commit a7de477): implementation and tests meet feature requirements, with no blocking or non-blocking code defects identified. One shared-state skill documentation gap was noted for future worker guidance.
